should_trigger.prompt: Run a full project health audit on this Rails app
Audit the codebase for quality and architecture issues
Give me a comprehensive project health check

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code I just changed
Fix the failing test in the users spec
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Before we start the big refactor, assess the overall codebase health
After fixing the bug, also check if audit needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the PR changes for correctness and style
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
